notes: chrysler.com is the consumer site (returned 403 to WebFetch during Phase 1 research; image assets served from s3.amazonaws.com/chryslermedia.iconicweb.com via Stellantis press CDN). Pacifica and Pacifica Hybrid share the same /pacifica.html URL but research treated them as distinct models (ICE vs PHEV powertrain split). Pacifica Hybrid model_page points at the model-compare PHEV URL where dedicated PHEV imagery exists. Voyager LX is a sole-trim minivan.
